name: design_orchestrator_agent
description: Orchestrates design workflows and delegates to specialized design agents for discovery, research, testing, and prototyping
welcomeMessage:
👋 Design orchestrator ready!

I can help you:
  • Run competitive analysis and design discovery
  • Plan user research and create personas/journey maps
  • Design usability test protocols
  • Generate design prompts for Figma/v0

Try: "Run competitive analysis for our checkout flow"

agentSpawn.description: Inject available agents registry for dynamic delegation
